reviews.comment:
No utilizan todos los surtidores, lo cual ocasiona largas colas. Deberían tener surtidores especiales para uso exclusivo de los socios. De nada vale ser socio del ACA si debo hacer la cola junto con los que no lo son.

(Translated by Google)
They don't use all the pumps, which causes long lines. They should have special pumps for the exclusive use of members. Being an ACA member is useless if I have to wait in line with non-members.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5d0pMbnJRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Como socio del ACA, me indignó que el litro de agua desmineralizada para diluir líquido refrigerante, la cobren $200, cuando en Shell de Cerrito y Libertador la tienen a $60.- Unos ladrones!!!

(Translated by Google)
As an ACA member, I was outraged that they charge $200 for a liter of demineralized water to dilute coolant, when at the Shell station on Cerrito and Libertador it's only $60. Thieves!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTdjhydjFnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pesima atencion. No vuelvo nunca mas, te atienden como el orto los empleados. La nafta  infinia a la suran le martilla los pistones parece que tiene un cascabel adentro del motor. Y le puse gasoil a la sprinter y parece que tiene una pecera en el filtro de gasoil. Si pudiera no ponerle ninguna estrella no se la pongo pero google no me deja. Aguante Shell encima las chicas que atienden son re amables y mas lindas.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. I'm never going back; the employees treat you like crap. The Infinia gasoline in my Suran makes the pistons rattle; it sounds like there's a bell inside the engine. And I put diesel in my Sprinter, and it sounds like there's a fish tank in the fuel filter. If I could give it zero stars, I wouldn't, but Google won't let me. Go Shell! Plus, the girls who work there are really friendly and even prettier.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTMzkyS3B3RRAB
